title: The Songs We Sang
overview: The Songs We Sang is a 2015 Singaporean documentary directed by Eva Tang. It is about Xinyao, Singaporean folk music that was popular in the 1980s.

trailers.title: THE SONGS WE SANG (Opens 24 March 2016 in Singapore)
